problem_title: Travel Rule message routing lacks traceability
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle to track Travel Rule message flows when routing data and exceptions are managed across disconnected systems. This creates gaps in audit evidence and complicates regulatory review and case reconstruction for VASPs.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY integrates message routing data, exception flags, originator and beneficiary details, and case management into one audit-ready workflow for VASP compliance teams to trace and review Travel Rule operations.
workflow_title: From Travel Rule message to evidence
workflow_description: SFTY captures message routing, status updates and exceptions to create cases, preserve evidence and support audit-ready compliance workflows for VASPs.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit

faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for VASP compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides VASPs with a connected compliance layer that connects Travel Rule messages, routing status, customer data and cases into structured workflows for audit readiness and operational control.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY manage Travel Rule message routing?
faq_2_answer: SFTY organizes Travel Rule messages by routing status, exceptions and jurisdictional policies, creating cases for incomplete or high-risk events to support comprehensive review and follow-up within compliance workflows.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve Travel Rule audit evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY records complete audit trails of message routing, decisions, exceptions and reviewer actions, preserving evidence packages to support regulatory review and internal compliance investigations.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing Travel Rule providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY sits above existing Travel Rule providers, connecting their outputs into a controlled, auditable workflow without requiring replacement or direct modification of underlying systems.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace Travel Rule messaging providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace Travel Rule messaging providers but integrates their data to enable end-to-end compliance workflows, evidence preservation and supervisory reporting support.
final_title: Review Travel Rule routing and audit evidence
final_description: See how SFTY connects message routing, exceptions and customer data into audit-ready compliance workflows for VASPs.
